mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report(reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status) VALUES(#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM report r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reporter_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, handle_result = #{handleResult} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = 0
